title: ophrys bertolonii var. catalaunica
intro: Ophrys bertolonii var. catalaunica, also known as the Catalonian bee orchid, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Ophrys bertolonii, a type of orchid found in the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ophrys bertolonii var. catalaunica are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
